atlas_description: Meiotic-event evidence hub — consumer of ngsTracts outputs (crossover and gene-conversion classifications derived from ngsPedigree Stage 3 departure intervals). 226-sample pure C. gariepinus hatchery cohort.

_paired_with._doc: Producer/consumer pair. ngsTracts is the analysis side (STEP_TRC_01 classifier, STEP_TRC_02 traversal breakpoint refiner). The meiosis-atlas is the consumer / browser UI.

_scaffold_note: Empty scaffold. Pages to be migrated from relatedness-atlas/atlases/relatedness/pages/hub/ — populate the `pages` array below and drop the matching .html / .js / page-folder into atlases/meiosis/pages/hub/.

server._doc: Meiosis Atlas does NOT ship its own server binary — it consumes the atlas-core unified server (atlas-core/server/atlas_server.py).

stages.label: evidence hub
stages._doc: Meiotic events hub. Mirrors the relatedness-atlas hub stage.
